No Poverty.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to poverty eradication.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). Developing an 'International Perspective' and conversational skills promotes global citizenship and cultural diversity (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Language skills can indirectly support sustainable tourism (Target 8.9) by enabling communication with local cultures, though this is not a direct course objective.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Fostering communication skills, an 'International Perspective,' and 'Civic Competences' can promote social inclusion and understanding across diverse cultures and origins (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The core competency 'Advocating the Culturally Care Spirit' combined with language learning can contribute to understanding and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: The course content and objectives do not provide any evidence, direct or indirect, related to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Developing an 'International Perspective' and cross-cultural communication skills can foster mutual understanding, which is foundational for peace (aligning with the spirit of Goal 16).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Language proficiency and an 'International Perspective' are key enablers for international cooperation and multi-stakeholder partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
